pathResource.name: Repertoire
pathResource.description: At the start of each Show, prepare a number of known Gifts equal to Grade + 1 at listed cost; unprepared Gifts cost double and add +1 difficulty band.

list.name: Warm Up the Room
list.effect: Lower House Difficulty by 1 for the rest of the scene

list.name: Directed Applause
list.effect: +2 dice to an ally's next roll

list.name: Drumroll
list.effect: Generate 1 Momentum

list.name: Take the Mic
list.effect: A small group's attention snaps to you for a round

list.name: Good Setup
list.effect: An ally's next Gift costs 1 less Laughter

list.name: Yes, And...
list.effect: Turn an ally's Failure into a minor immediate advantage

list.name: Patter
list.effect: Reduce Suspicion by 1, once per scene

list.name: Stage Presence
list.effect: Become the enemy's focus for a round

list.name: Standing Ovation
list.effect: Generate 2 Momentum and give an ally +2 dice, together

list.name: Joint Number
list.effect: You and an ally combine actions: roll once, take the better result, both gain any Laughter earned

list.name: Quiet, Please
list.effect: Calm an agitated or hostile crowd, lowering scene tension

list.name: Change of Act
list.effect: Swap one prepared Gift for another known Gift, mid-scene

list.name: Party Pooper
list.effect: Interrupt and cancel another performer's attempt to work a crowd

list.name: Comic Rhythm
list.effect: This scene, allies gain +1 Laughter whenever they score Cheers

list.name: Double or Nothing
list.effect: Treat your next House Die as the better of two rolls — a Jeers result still counts as Jeers with an extra point of Suspicion

list.name: Star Turn
list.effect: All allies in the scene gain +1 die and 1 Laughter

list.name: The Show Is Ours
list.effect: Redistribute up to 3 of your Laughter to allies as you choose, plus 1 free Momentum

list.name: Tame the Room
list.effect: Lower House Difficulty by 2 for the rest of the scene, ignoring further Suspicion-driven hardening

list.name: From Disaster, Gold
list.effect: Turn an ally's Corpsing result into a Flop instead

list.name: Curtain Call
list.effect: Summon a small crowd of distracting "extras" for several rounds

list.name: Off Beat
list.effect: Deny an enemy's next activation of the Spotlight

list.name: Grand Finale
list.effect: The whole party may act out of turn, in sequence, once

list.name: Master of Ceremonies
list.effect: Command a large mortal crowd for a scene, as an extension of your act

list.name: Never Work Alone
list.effect: Until the scene ends, every point of Laughter you spend on an ally is doubled in effect

list.name: Everything's Material
list.effect: This scene, every ally's Jeers result gives you 1 Laughter instead of giving the MC Suspicion

list.name: The Show of Their Lives
list.effect: Once per campaign, free: for a whole scene, the party ignores House Difficulty entirely, shares a doubled Momentum pool, and anyone can spend anyone's Laughter.

list.name: The Voice That Fills the Theatre
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: Stage Presence becomes passive and always on, and your presence alone permanently lowers House Difficulty by 1 for the whole party.

pathResource.name: Schools of Illusion
pathResource.description: Learns broad Schools instead of fixed spells, each with a Domain and a Limit. Combining two Schools costs the sum plus +1 Laughter and raises difficulty by one Grade. Advancing a Grade can be spent on Mastery (loosening a known School's Limit) instead of learning a new School.

list.name: Prestidigitation
list.domain: Create, alter, or vanish small inanimate objects
list.limit: Hand-sized only; lasts one scene; nothing mechanically complex

list.name: Smoke and Mirrors
list.domain: Purely visual/audio illusions, including duplicates of yourself
list.limit: No substance — breaks if touched with conviction

list.name: The Great Escape
list.domain: Free yourself from bonds or a grip
list.limit: Must first be seen struggling — not an instant effect

list.name: The Hat Trick
list.domain: Produce a plausible small item; summon a Minor construct
list.limit: Whatever's produced must be plausibly "producible" from a hat or case

list.name: Transformation
list.domain: Change your appearance or another's (face, clothes, voice)
list.limit: Doesn't change mass or real ability; close physical contact can notice the seam

list.name: The Vanishing Act
list.domain: Teleport a short distance to somewhere you can see or know well
list.limit: Needs a plausible cover; fails under constant direct observation by an alert enemy

list.name: Carnival Fortune-Telling
list.limit: The answer always arrives as a riddle or tarot-style image, never as plain data

list.name: Illusionist's Hands
list.domain: Fine manipulation at a distance, as if by invisible hands
list.limit: Minimal force only — nothing requiring real strength

list.name: The Impossible Cage
list.domain: Trap or restrain a target inside a rule-bound illusion
list.limit: Target escapes by solving the trick (opposed roll) or with an ally's help — never a permanent prison

list.name: Levitation
list.domain: Slow flight for objects or people, including yourself
list.limit: Breaks if the floating weight takes a hard hit; requires ongoing concentration

list.name: The Great Trick
list.domain: Summon a Major construct, or several Minor ones at once
list.limit: One Major construct active at a time

list.name: False Mirror
list.domain: Deceive senses beyond sight — touch, smell, temperature
list.limit: Still can't cause real damage; breaks under a deliberate, skeptical test

list.name: The Shared Illusion
list.domain: Deceive an entire group at once with one large-scale illusion
list.limit: Needs the group to lack a strong reason to doubt; one determined skeptic can start unraveling it

list.name: Escape from Death
list.domain: A prepared escape that pulls you and nearby allies to safety from certain death
list.limit: Must be prepared in advance (uses a Repertoire slot); one use per preparation

list.name: The Menagerie
list.domain: Summon several Major constructs, or a coordinated swarm
list.limit: Actively directing them takes your full concentration — no other Gifts while you do

list.name: The Ultimate Escape
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: The Great Escape and The Vanishing Act lose their Limits entirely — escape and teleport at will, even under direct observation.

list.name: Reality Is My Stage
list.effect: Once per campaign, 10 Laughter: combine every School you know into a single act that rewrites how an entire scene is perceived and remembered.

constructs.name: Shadow Puppet
constructs.role: Stealthy scout, acts on its own

pathResource.name: Debt
pathResource.description: Every Prerogative lists a Laughter cost (clean) and a Debt cost (fiat, always payable at 0-10 track).

thresholds.effect: First warning: the Patron makes itself known; the MC gains narrative leverage
Collection: the Patron demands what it's owed, in the form specific to your Patron
Contract executed: the Patron's severest consequence triggers without mercy

subtypes.name: The Heir
subtypes.focus: Pays Debt by honoring the dead Clown's legacy; when collected, risks true Possession (Face rating vs. spirit's Renown rating, same method as Incorporation).

subtypes.name: The Ward
subtypes.patron: A dead Ring Legend or something else in the Backstage, acting as a distant mentor
subtypes.focus: Pays Debt through assigned tasks; collection means an inescapable favor owed.

subtypes.name: The Debtor
subtypes.focus: Pays it back only by generating real, abundant Laughter; collection costs Face directly, cold and negotiation-free.

list.name: Borrowed Touch
list.effect: A contact attack that ignores normal soak

list.name: The Other's Voice
list.effect: +2 dice to intimidation or presence for a scene

list.name: Collateral
list.effect: Absorb the next blow that would drop you, once per scene

list.name: Whisper from Beyond
list.effect: Ask your Motley's spirit a question; get a short, reliable answer

list.name: Advance on Account
list.effect: Instantly regain 2 Laughter — Debt-only, can't be paid with Laughter

list.name: Feed the Debt
list.effect: When you score Cheers, you may convert that Laughter into Debt payment at double efficiency

list.name: Blow of the Leash
list.effect: A small-area attack

list.name: Mark of the Pact
list.effect: +2 dice on all Prerogatives against a target you've marked, this scene

list.name: Borrowed Shield
list.effect: Reduce incoming damage for a scene

list.name: Gestured Inheritance
list.effect: Temporarily use a minor Gift of the dead Clown whose Motley you carry (chosen at creation)

list.name: Call for Collection
list.effect: Call in a powerful one-time favor from your Patron, negotiated with the MC

list.name: Harvest of Pain
list.effect: A strong hit; if it drops the target, refund Laughter or pay down Debt, your choice

list.name: Binding Contract
list.effect: Force a supernatural bargain on a target; breaking it harms them

list.name: Borrowed Form
list.effect: Gain a fixed physical boon from your Patron for a scene (set when learned)

list.name: Possess the Scene
list.effect: Gain an extra action this turn — the spirit enjoys the wheel a little too much

list.name: Debt Made Manifest
list.effect: An attack whose damage scales directly with your current Debt level

list.name: Execute the Clause
list.effect: The Shackled's biggest hit — massive damage to one target, or strong damage split among several

list.name: Shared Debt
list.effect: Split your power and your burden with a willing ally for a scene

list.name: The Patron Manifests
list.effect: Your Patron intervenes directly — a major effect negotiated with the MC. Nearly guarantees a Collection soon

list.name: Settle the Account
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: your Debt ceiling rises, but Collection can never Possess you or force an inescapable task again — you negotiate with your Patron as an equal.

list.name: Break the Chains
list.effect: Once per campaign, free: spend your entire accumulated Debt at once for an effect that scales with how much you owed. Debt resets to 0 — but the Patron is deeply, lastingly displeased.

pathResource.name: Comfort
pathResource.description: Generated backwards from other Paths: earned by genuinely caring for someone (a scene of real attention, resolved with Poise + Persuasion or Awareness). Fuels every Gift. Escalating scale of sacrifice: Comfort (sustainable) -> Carry the Pain (overflow as Suspicion/strain) -> Transfusion (own Face directly).

specialAbility.name: Diagnosis
specialAbility.effect: Reveal a target's true resource state and hidden conditions — real Laughter/Face levels, a hidden Motley, a Pact, how close to 0 Face they are.

list.name: Bedside Manner
list.effect: The base action: a scene of real care generates Comfort

list.name: First Aid
list.effect: Restore 1 Face, or stabilize a dying ally

list.name: Diagnosis
list.effect: Reveal a target's true resource state and hidden conditions

list.name: Steady Hands
list.effect: Emergency healing usable as a reaction

list.name: Step In Front
list.effect: Redirect a blow meant for an adjacent ally onto yourself

list.name: Stay and Sit With
list.effect: Nullify a target's fear or despair for a scene

list.name: Rounds
list.effect: Restore 1 Face to each of up to three allies

list.name: Carry the Pain
list.effect: Heal beyond what your Comfort covers, taking the overflow as Suspicion or strain

list.name: Inoculation
list.effect: Shield an ally against the next instance of a specific harm, for a scene

list.name: Resuscitation
list.effect: Bring a physically incapacitated ally back into the fight, with partial Health

list.name: Last Words
list.effect: Speak with the spirit of a recently fallen Clown; gain information or a closing effect

list.name: Recovery Room
list.effect: A calm zone: allies inside slowly regain Face and resist fear/manipulation

list.name: Transfusion
list.cost: Your own Face (real sacrifice, no Comfort)
list.effect: Give your own Face directly to another character

list.name: White Coat Wall
list.effect: Any grave hit against a nearby ally this scene can be redirected to you

list.name: Discharge Papers
list.effect: Clear all of a target's temporary afflictions

list.name: Disarm the Reaper
list.effect: Cut a fear-fed enemy off from its power for several rounds

list.name: Ward Miracle
list.effect: Restore 3 Face to each ally in the scene, or fully restore one ally about to hit 0 Face

list.name: No One Falls Today
list.effect: For a scene, allies near you can't be reduced below 1 Face by anything you could have blocked

list.name: Sit at the Threshold
list.effect: Suspends an ally at 0 Face instead of losing them, if the scene resolves in their favor

list.name: The Last Rounds
list.effect: Once per campaign, free: fully restore the whole party's Face, clear every affliction, revive the fallen, and deny the next break anyone would suffer this scene.

list.name: The One Who Carries Everyone
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: no Comfort limit on Carry the Pain or Transfusion — always pay the overflow with your own Face, Suspicion, and strain, without end.

pathResource.name: Cards
pathResource.description: Prep actions earn a Card at no Laughter cost. Hand size cap = 2 + Grade. Cards persist through the scene. Gifts marked 'X+ Cards' spend that many Cards instead of Laughter.

list.name: Set the Trick
list.effect: Earn 1 Card

list.name: Precise Strike
list.effect: The signature attack — damage scales with Cards spent; requires an opening

list.name: Quick Hands
list.effect: Steal an object without being noticed

list.name: Cut the Laughter
list.effect: Steal 1 Laughter from a target

list.name: Look Over There
list.effect: Distract a target or small group, opening a window

list.name: Slip Away
list.effect: Reposition and become hard to follow

list.name: Extra Sleeve
list.effect: +1 hand size; gain a free Card at the start of combat

list.name: Theft in Plain Sight
list.effect: Steal something guarded or from an alert target's hands

list.name: Clown's Stab
list.effect: A hit that bleeds through soak and applies a lingering status

list.name: The Con
list.effect: Convince a target of a useful falsehood for a scene

list.name: Steal the Spotlight
list.effect: Deny an enemy's next activation of the Spotlight

list.name: Full House
list.effect: A big hit, or damage split among several opened targets

list.name: The Big Score
list.effect: Steal something major — a key item, a debilitated enemy's Motley, a borrowed Gift for a scene

list.name: Comic Execution
list.effect: A finishing blow against an opened, weakened target

list.name: Master of the Con
list.effect: Rewrite what a group believes happened

list.name: Never Was Here
list.effect: Erase evidence and attention of a recent act of yours

list.name: The Royal Flush
list.effect: Dump your entire hand into one devastating finisher — the bigger the hand, the worse it hurts

list.name: The Heist of the Century
list.effect: Steal something that shouldn't be stealable — a cornered enemy's Face, a major artifact, a scene-defining prize

list.name: Puppeteer
list.effect: Control a group of mortals or minor enemies for a scene through misdirection

list.name: The Hand No One Sees
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: gain a free Card every turn in combat, and your hand size cap is removed.

list.name: The Perfect Theft
list.effect: Once per campaign, full hand + 5 Laughter: steal something truly impossible — Renown, a Pact, an identity, a moment reclaimed from the past.

pathResource.name: Stance & Grit
pathResource.description: No spending pool beyond Laughter. Free chosen Stance, switchable as a minor action: Attack (+2 dice to hit, -2 dice to Dodge), Guard (redirect a hit meant for an adjacent ally, +2 to soak, -2 dice to hit), Grit (halve all incoming damage after soak, but only a minor action this turn). Grit bonus: at half or fewer Health boxes, +1 die to attacks; on last Health box, +2 dice instead (not cumulative).

list.name: Weighted Pie
list.effect: The signature hit — solid, reliable damage

list.name: Change Stance
list.effect: Unlocks the three base Stances

list.name: Big Top Hide
list.effect: The best soak in the game: +2 to your Toughness soak

list.name: Lift Anything
list.effect: A feat of strength: lift, throw, or break something far beyond human norms

list.name: Human Wall
list.effect: Protect more than one adjacent ally at once while in Guard Stance

list.name: Return With Interest
list.effect: Counterattack immediately after taking a hit, scaled by your current Grit bonus

list.name: Spinning Strike
list.effect: Hit all adjacent enemies at once

list.name: Second Wind
list.effect: Recover Health; the more hurt you are, the more you recover

list.name: Throw
list.effect: Grab and throw an enemy or heavy object, dealing damage and repositioning the target

list.name: Nobody Gets Past
list.effect: While in Guard Stance, enemies must overcome you to reach anyone behind you

list.name: The Angrier I Get
list.effect: Your Grit bonus applies to all damage rolls, not just your Main Action attack

list.name: A Hit Felt in the Room
list.effect: A devastating single-target strike that can stun

list.name: Colossus Stance
list.effect: Very high offense and defense at once; while in it, you never seize the Spotlight ahead of anyone else who could act

list.name: Carnival Titan
list.effect: A feat of strength on a bigger scale — flip a vehicle, bring down a wall

list.name: Shield of the Weak
list.effect: Redirect a grave hit meant for any ally in the scene onto yourself, not just adjacent ones

list.name: Demolition Ball
list.effect: Launch yourself through multiple enemies in a line, damage scaled by Grit

list.name: The Strength Number
list.effect: The biggest reliable hit in the game — massive, guaranteed damage, no special conditions needed

list.name: Unmovable
list.effect: For a scene, you can't be moved, knocked down, or bypassed by any means short of a Renown 8+ effect

list.name: I Don't Know When to Quit
list.effect: Rise from a hit that should have dropped you, at 1 Health box and full Grit bonus

list.name: The One Who Stands Before the World
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: while you stand and are able to take a hit in someone's place, nearby allies can't be reduced to 0 Face.

list.name: One Single Hit
list.effect: Once per campaign, free: one devastating blow, its power scaling with how hurt you already are, strong enough to fell even a top-tier boss outright.

pathResource.name: Conviction
pathResource.description: Only resource generated purely by roleplay: award 1 Conviction for a small genuine act in service of the Oath, 2-3 for a costly or campaign-defining act. Oathbreaking (acting against your own vow) drops all Conviction to zero, disables the Aura, and locks out Conviction-fueled Gifts until an act of atonement.

subtypes.name: Oath of the Ring
subtypes.focus: Protecting the craft and those under your care.
subtypes.aura: Allies within it resist fear and manipulation.

subtypes.name: Oath of the Rebel
subtypes.aura: Allies within it hit harder against foes of greater status or Renown.

subtypes.name: Oath of the Promise
subtypes.focus: Sworn to protect, avenge, or honor one specific person.
subtypes.aura: Bonuses when acting in that person's name.

list.name: The Vow Made Force
list.effect: Sets your Aura and Conviction generation in motion

list.name: Punishment
list.effect: The signature attack — extra damage against whatever your Oath condemns

list.name: Firm Word
list.effect: Shake off a fear or doubt effect and gain +2 dice to your next roll

list.name: Plant the Flag
list.effect: Claim a zone: allies inside resist better and you hit harder against anyone who invades it

list.name: Challenge the Giant
list.effect: Gain bonuses against a specific higher-Renown or higher-status enemy for the scene

list.name: In Your Name
list.effect: Invoke your Promise before acting: +2 dice, and success generates extra Conviction

list.name: Aura Ablaze
list.effect: Double your Aura's effect for a scene

list.name: Shield of the Vow
list.effect: Take a grave hit meant for an ally

list.name: Sentence
list.effect: Impose a binding order on a target with real moral weight behind it

list.name: Cry of Rebellion
list.effect: Inspire allies against a powerful enemy: immediate extra attack or repositioning for the party

list.name: I Won't Fail You
list.effect: You and the one you swore to protect shield each other, even at a distance, for a scene

list.name: Greater Punishment
list.effect: A bigger hit that can stun or knock down whatever your Oath condemns

list.name: Living Banner
list.effect: Your Aura extends to affect the entire scene, regardless of distance, for several rounds

list.name: Ring's Judgment
list.effect: Restore order to a chaotic scene: calm crowds, reassert control in your favor

list.name: Voice of the Voiceless
list.effect: Strip a powerful enemy's advantage of status against your weaker allies, for a scene

list.name: Until the End
list.effect: While actively honoring your Promise in the scene, you can't drop below "standing"

list.name: Final Sentence
list.effect: The Sworn's biggest, most decisive hit

list.name: Unbreakable Aura
list.effect: For a scene, allies inside your Aura can't hit 0 Face while you stand and your Oath holds

list.name: The Vow That Moves Mountains
list.effect: Turn a Failure — yours or a nearby ally's — into a Success

list.name: The Oath Made Flesh
list.effect: Permanent, no cost: your Aura can't be turned off except by Oathbreaking, and always runs at full strength.

list.name: The Final Word
list.effect: Once per campaign: spend all your Conviction on one absolute, willed act that embodies your Oath at maximum scale.
